title: Happy National Scrapbooking Day!
excerpt: Hope you'll consider joining in on the fun at Two Peas In A Bucket this weekend. There are lots of projects and activities going on there as well as the blog . You can see my completed CHA daybook here…
body:
Hope you'll consider joining in on the fun at Two Peas In A Bucket this weekend. There are lots of projects and activities going on there as well as the blog.

You can see my completed CHA daybook here.

I am the last stop on the Garden Girl Morph and there are prizes at each stop. Enter by leaving a comment on each layout. Shannon, Wilna, Lynn, Wendy Sue, and I had a lot of fun with this project. Happy crafty weekend!

NOTE: Creativation (formerly CHA)
